title: Orchestrator Task Definition
description: A planned task used by orchestrator-dispatch to build the run DAG before envelopes are posted.

agent.description: Agent type that will execute this task.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this task does.

depends_on.description: Upstream task IDs that must be done before this task is dispatched.

inputs.description: Agent-specific input parameters merged into the envelope client_payload.

max_attempts.description: Maximum retry attempts before the task is marked failed. Overrides orchestrator-policy.yml when set.

sla_minutes.description: Minutes after dispatch before orchestrator-scheduler marks the task blocked.

priority.description: Task priority for scheduling and alerting.
